archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mapped for Dashboard legibility

typography.instructions: Import 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter. Maintain tight letter spacing on headings and open spacing for table data.

layout_spacing.strategy: Control Room Grid. Utilize tight gaps for widgets but generous padding inside containers. Use cardless boundaries with a 1px solid stroke for definition rather than shadows.

component_strategies.cards_widgets: Flat backgrounds (bg-slate-900), 1px stroke (border-slate-800), zero drop-shadow to maintain clean aesthetics in dark mode.
component_strategies.buttons: Primary buttons: solid emerald (bg-emerald-500 text-white) with subtle hover shift. Secondary: transparent with 1px border (border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800).
component_strategies.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned data, with distinct status badges.
component_strategies.status_badges: Use soft backgrounds (bg-emerald-500/10) with solid text (text-emerald-400) for visual harmony.
component_strategies.navigation: Fixed left sidebar with crisp hover states (bg-slate-800) for links. Top header holding profile actions and global search.

motion_interactions.hover_states: Transform translate-y-[-2px] for interactive cards. Highlight text colors on hover.
motion_interactions.micro_interactions: Smooth appearance for toast notifications and modal mounting.

login_hero.description: Abstract midnight blue tech background. Use for the auth split-screen background.

campus_hero.description: Modern college architecture. Use within a welcome card in the dashboard or an onboarding flow.

avatar_placeholder.description: Professional student placeholder portrait for avatar components.

icons.style: Use regular or duotone weights to match the sleek corporate tech vibe.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='submit-complaint-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the dark theme using Tailwind's slate and emerald scales as defined in color_palette.
Construct the login/register layout as a split-screen design. Place the 'login_hero' image as the background cover for the decorative half.
Implement a dashboard with a collapsible sidebar and top header.
Ensure 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' are configured correctly in the root HTML and Tailwind config.
Build the dashboard statistics widgets using the 'Control Room' grid pattern (dense, border-slate-800 borders, flat bg-slate-900 backgrounds).
Complaint statuses (Pending, In Progress, Resolved) must have clear, distinct badges utilizing traffic-light semantics (Amber, Cyan/Purple, Emerald).

Use Shadcn UI for complex components like Dialogs (for complaint submission), Dropdowns, and Tables, but customize them heavily to remove default 'Vercel-like' styling in favor of the dark corporate aesthetic.
Adhere to WCAG AA contrast rules for text on dark backgrounds.
